summary: Completed comprehensive testing of calendar view and export functionality for 8-Week PPO Tracker. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Calendar view tab switches correctly between List and Calendar views
Calendar displays current month (March 2026) with proper navigation
Calendar navigation buttons (prev/next month) work correctly
Today's date (March 31st) is highlighted with red border
Export dropdown shows both PDF and Excel options
PDF export generates and downloads file successfully
Excel export generates and downloads file with success notification
Calendar legend displays correctly (Pending, Completed, Today indicators)
Calendar view displays empty state correctly (no tasks with due dates)
Tab switching between views maintains state correctly
Authentication and session management working properly
UI styling and Airtel branding consistent throughout
